channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Ireland says there will be no computation without generation
item.description: Ireland’s Commission for Regulation of Utilities (CRU), the nation’s independent regulator of energy and water, is proposing strict new rules for data center operators, key among them being that new facilities will “be required to provide generation and/or storage capacity to match the requested dat
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The iPhone 16E is here. Here are 5 ways it’s different from the iPhone SE
item.description: Apple has introduced its first new product of 2025: the iPhone 16E. The new iPhone replaces the iPhone SE from Apple’s lineup—the company’s entry-level, budget iPhone.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Zuckerberg philanthropy ends DEI programs
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg's philanthropy has shuttered its diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) programs as well as work on immigration reform as it reduces social advocacy work, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative (CZI) announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: This AI tool could help curb domestic violence
item.description: A new technology can pinpoint victims of intimate partner violence four years earlier than other detection systems and with 80% accuracy.
item.dc:creator: Sibani Ram, Fast Company

item.title: This startup wants to be Shopify for indie filmmakers
item.description: A new startup is leaning on the power of recommendations to spread the word about indie films. Olyn offers a direct-to-consumer platform for film and video distribution, enabling filmmakers to retain up to 90% of their revenue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: The Decline of Physical Media: Sales of 4K Blu-ray, Blu-ray, and DVDs Plummet
item.description: Sales of 4K Blu-ray, Blu-ray, and DVD disc formats declined significantly in 2024, while subscription streaming services experienced substantial growth.
item.dc:creator: james.davidson@futurenet.com (James Davidson), TechRadar

item.title: Apple unveils a souped-up and more expensive version of its lowest priced iPhone
item.description: Apple has released a sleeker and more expensive version of its lowest priced iPhone in an attempt to widen the audience for a bundle of artificial intelligence technology that the company has been hoping will revive demand for its most profitable product lineup.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Prince fans will finally get to hear Purple Rain in Dolby Atmos, as the classic movie comes to Dolby Cinemas for a one-night-only screening
item.description: The film Purple Rain will be re-released with better visuals and audio for a one-night-only event at Dolby Cinemas across the United States and the United Kingdom.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Clues in Windows 11 suggest Microsoft has a nifty plan to help you move all your stuff from an old PC to a new computer more easily and conveniently
item.description: Worried about how you’ll transfer all your files and settings from your existing PC to a new one? Windows 11 might soon help with a handy ‘Migration’ app.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: 22 new tricks for your Google Pixel Clock app
item.description: Google’s Pixel phones are practically overflowing with useful stuff. And some of the best options of all are things you’ve probably never even noticed.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Elon Musk faces more conflict-of-interest questions after DOGE fires FDA staff reviewing Neuralink
item.description: Since the moment the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) was first proposed, Elon Musk’s critics have warned that the world’s richest man was at risk of making decisions that could be a conflict of interest, given his multiple business operations.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Musk's xAI claims new Grok 3 model performs better than rivals
item.description: Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence (AI) company, xAI, claimed Tuesday that its newest model outperforms similar products from competitors like OpenAI and DeepSeek.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Don't let AI phantom hackers drain your bank account
item.description: Attackers use caller ID spoofing and AI voices to steal money. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson provides seven ways to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White House says Elon Musk is not part of DOGE
item.description: The White House said Monday that Elon Musk is technically not part of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), even though the tech billionaire is said to be leading its sweeping cost-cutting efforts.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Data center spending to top $1 trillion by 2029 as AI transforms infrastructure
item.description: Massive global demand for AI technology is causing data centers to increase spending on servers, power, and cooling infrastructure. As a result, data center CapEx spending will hit $1.1 trillion by 2029, up from $430 billion in 2024, according to Dell’Oro Group. Much of this growth is due to AI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Mistral turns focus toward regional LLMs with Saba release
item.description: French AI startup Mistral is turning its focus toward providing large language models (LLMs) that understand regional languages and their parlance as a result of rising demand among its enterprise customers. “Making AI ubiquitous requires addressing every culture and language.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Key strategies for MLops success in 2025
item.description: Integrating and managing artificial intelligence and machine learning effectively within business operations has become a top priority for businesses looking to stay competitive in an ever evolving landscape.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Neudesic launches in Australia in a bid to speed up AI adoption for IT teams
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) has gained significant traction among business leaders keen to explore ways it can drive operational efficiencies and cost savings. But while top leadership is sold on its potential, it’s a different tale for IT teams working the ground.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth, consumers
item.description: Since taking office, Trump has said he would place tariffs on foreign production of computer chips and semiconductors in order to return chip manufacturing to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Trump's Stargate ambitions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk. “OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk says he'll withdraw $97.4 billion bid for OpenAI if ChatGPT maker remains nonprofit
item.description: Elon Musk says he will abandon his $97.4 billion offer to buy the nonprofit behind OpenAI if the ChatGPT maker drops its plan to convert into a for-profit company. “If OpenAI, Inc.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
